text: New site just dropped. La La Land aesthetic, glass cards, video backgrounds per section. Took longer than expected but it finally feels like me.
The hardest part of a personal site isn't the code. It's deciding who you want to be when someone googles you at 2am.
IDOMA HUB — restarting from scratch with a much clearer idea. 5 learner archetypes, CEFR scoring, differentiated result page. This one feels real.
Rewatched Happy Together. Still devastates the same way. The Buenos Aires footage hits different at 1am when you're alone in a café.
Sketchs is done. 40 pages, a whole story, a real ending. My first completed comic. Nano Banana2 made it better than I could have alone.
Black Country, New Road — Basketball Shoes on repeat. The outro is 8 minutes long and I've listened to it 14 times this week. Not sorry.
